top_items.title: Introducing multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway: Scale AI workloads around the world
top_items.one_liner: Multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway preview enhances AI/ML inference scalability and resilience across regions.

top_items.title: Why context is the missing link in AI data security
top_items.one_liner: Context is vital for effective AI data security, moving beyond basic controls to prevent leaks and misuse.

top_items.title: Anthropic gives Claude shared context across Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint, enabling reusable workflows in multiple applications - VentureBeat
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's Claude now offers shared context across Excel and PowerPoint for reusable workflows.
